FreightMind AI
Your fleet runs itself.

AI-Native Operating System for Freight

8 AI agents, 92 MCP tools, 5 sellable tiers. Each tier works standalone. Combine for full automation. MCP Server orchestrates everything.

Full Package /truck/mo

1
Tier 1
Load Operations
Find & Price Freight
$149 /truck/month
Freight Finder Rate Engine
  • Load board scanning (DAT, Truckstop)
  • Load-to-load matching (CHAIN, BACKHAUL)
  • AI rate quoting with market data
  • Spot market win/loss analytics
  • RFP import & auto-pricing
  • Carrier onboarding & scoring
  • Shipper relationship intelligence
  • Churn detection & upsell identification
34 Tools — LIVE
2
Tier 2
Fleet Operations
Move & Track
$149 /truck/month
Dispatch AI Tracking
  • Auto-dispatch (7-factor driver scoring)
  • Real-time GPS/ELD tracking
  • Geofence auto-detection
  • Dynamic ETA recalculation
  • Delay detection & customer alerts
  • Fleet map with live positions
  • Multi-load trip chaining
  • Dock appointment scheduling
20 Tools — LIVE
3
Tier 3
Financial Operations
Bill & Collect
$149 /truck/month
Billing & Settlement
  • Auto-invoice on POD receipt
  • Invoice factoring integration
  • AR aging & collections automation
  • Driver settlement calculation
  • Carrier invoice audit
  • Dispute generation & tracking
  • Fuel card reconciliation
  • IFTA fuel tax from GPS
13 Tools — LIVE
4
Tier 4
Compliance & Safety
Stay Legal
$99 /truck/month
Compliance Maintenance
  • Real-time HOS monitoring
  • CDL/insurance expiry tracking
  • FMCSA authority verification
  • Preventive maintenance scheduling
  • Breakdown prediction
  • ELD log auditing
  • Drug test scheduling
  • Cost-per-mile tracking
18 Tools — LIVE
5
Tier 5
Neural Intelligence
The Brain
$149 /truck/month
Neural
  • Cross-tier diagnostic scans

MCP Server Endpoints
GET/freight_broker/mcp/statusOrchestrator health + tiers
POST/freight_broker/mcp/tools/listList tools (filtered by tier)
POST/freight_broker/mcp/tools/callExecute any tool (tier-gated)
POST/freight_broker/mcp/eventsCross-tier event routing
GET/freight_broker/mcp/tiersTier definitions + pricing
GET/freight_broker/api/agentsAgent registry
POST/freight_broker/api/agents/:name/tools/callDirect agent tool call
GET/freight_broker/api/tenantsList SaaS tenants
POST/freight_broker/api/tenantsOnboard new tenant
GET/freight_broker/healthSystem health
